currentClaim: Pending Proposal Visibility v1 已 accepted：Threadsmith 现在可以用 proposal-status 命令显示 pending / reviewed / invalid proposal，且不改变人工采纳边界。

doneWhenChecklist.label: 新增 Pending Proposal Visibility v1 实施计划
新增 focused tests 与 smoke 覆盖 pending/reviewed/invalid
Cross-Agent State Bridge v1 文档与 operator guide 说明 proposal status
proposal status smoke、focused tests、project truth、skill contract、diff hygiene 与 JSON 校验通过

knownGaps: 这轮只做命令行/summary visibility，不做前端 UI。
这轮不改变 proposal review 的人工采纳边界。
